paper_title: Analysis of Precipitation and Ice Core Data in the Central Tibetan Plateau

methods.description: Analysis of a nearly 50-year precipitation record from the Tuotuohe Meteorological Station to understand the climate characteristics of the central Tibetan Plateau.

steps.description: Analysis of nearly 50-year precipitation record in the Tuotuohe Meteorological Station.
steps.searchable_summary: retrieve and analyze 50-year precipitation data from Tuotuohe Meteorological Station
outputs: climate characteristics of the central Tibetan Plateau

steps.description: Revealed the central Tibetan Plateau as a semi-arid region with specific temperature and precipitation characteristics.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze temperature and precipitation data to classify climate region

methods.method_name: Ice Core Drilling and Data Collection
methods.description: Drilling and collection of ice cores at a 6000 m-elevated site to study historical climate data.

steps.description: Three ice cores were drilled on the 6000 m-elevated site, respectively measuring 118.6 m, 152 m, and 214.7 m in length.
steps.searchable_summary: drill and collect ice cores at 6000 m elevation
outputs: ice cores of lengths 118.6 m, 152 m, and 214.7 m
